test_type: frontend only (impersonation E2E retest + brief regression smoke)
overall_status: GREEN — impersonation flow fully working end-to-end after localStorage key alignment
summary: Re-tested the impersonation E2E flow (and a brief regression smoke) after the iter-90 fix that renamed all 7 references in AdminUsersTab.js + ImpersonationBanner.js from `token`/`username` to `dm_token`/`dm_username`. Source-level audit confirms the fix is in place. Live e2e via Playwright on the public preview URL: login → /admin → admin-tab-users → impersonate-LCBlakey24 → confirm() accepted → app navigates to /home, impersonation-banner appears (text: 'IMPERSONATING LCBlakey24 (as LCBlakey24) Stop impersonating'), sessionStorage.rq_admin_token_stash is non-empty (length=153), sessionStorage.rq_admin_username_stash=LCBlakey24, localStorage.dm_token swapped to a fresh token (different from admin's original), localStorage.dm_username updated. Stop-impersonating-btn click clears both sessionStorage stash keys, restores dm_token to the original admin token, redirects to /admin, and the banner disappears. Regression smoke: /home renders character-search-input + campaign-search-input + character-sort + campaign-sort; search filters character list correctly. /characters/new/full loads Edition step with edition-2014 + edition-2024 testids and step-abilities pill is reachable in the wizard nav. Per request, did NOT re-run backend (iter-90 backend was 17/17 green) and did NOT re-run home-sort persistence or admin tab UI. Iter 90 is now fully green.

passed: Login with lcblakey24@outlook.com / LCBlakey24?! → /home, dm_token + dm_username persisted
Navigate /admin → click admin-tab-users → admin-users-tab renders, impersonate-LCBlakey24 button visible
Click impersonate → confirm() auto-accepted → POST /api/admin/users/LCBlakey24/impersonate → app navigates to /home
impersonation-banner is visible after impersonate, label reads 'IMPERSONATING LCBlakey24 (as LCBlakey24)'
sessionStorage.rq_admin_token_stash is non-empty (153 chars) and rq_admin_username_stash='LCBlakey24'
localStorage.dm_token differs from admin's original (token actually swapped) and dm_username updated
Click stop-impersonating-btn → sessionStorage stash keys cleared (null) → localStorage.dm_token restored to admin's original → redirected to /admin → banner removed
Regression: /home shows character-search-input, campaign-search-input, character-sort, campaign-sort; typing in character-search filters list
Regression: /characters/new/full loads Edition step (edition-2014 + edition-2024 testids), step-abilities pill present in wizard nav (reachable)

critical_code_review_comments: Iter-90 fix verified: AdminUsersTab.js (lines 50, 64, 88, 93-94, 97-98) and ImpersonationBanner.js (lines 20, 27-28) now consistently use dm_token/dm_username, matching App.js axios interceptor + login/logout. No remaining inconsistencies in the impersonation path.

Minor (carry-over from iter 90, low priority): AdminUsersTab.js still passes Authorization headers manually on /admin/users and /admin/export/*.csv even though the App.js axios interceptor would do this automatically. Cleanup-only — no functional impact.

Minor (low priority): ImpersonationBanner reads sessionStorage on render rather than reactively (no storage event listener). If an admin opens a second tab while impersonating, the banner state can be inconsistent across tabs until reload. Not blocking.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — impersonation E2E + regression smoke all pass

seed_data_creation: None — no new test data created in this iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 91 confirms iter 90 is fully green. Impersonation flow works end-to-end with banner, session-stash, token swap, and restore-on-stop. Home sort + admin tab UI + backend (17/17) were already verified in iter 90 and remain green. Next iteration can move on to new work — no remaining blockers from iter 90.
rca_of_the_issue: Iter-90 RCA confirmed: localStorage key mismatch resolved by renaming `token`→`dm_token` and `username`→`dm_username` across all 7 references in AdminUsersTab.js + ImpersonationBanner.js. Verified via live e2e: stash now captures the admin's real token (153 chars), token swap is observed, axios interceptor picks up the new dm_token without issue, and stop-impersonating cleanly restores.
